active_goal: Improve MemoryOS Lite v3 into a benchmark-usable Letta-style agent memory system for LongMemEval and LoCoMo, without demo-only phase completion, without hiding case-level regressions, and without enabling the v3 kernel by default.

supersedes.reason: stale after result.md and execute_review.md disclosed pre-existing dirty governance files separately from Phase 0 execution writes

findings: Phase 0 artifacts cite the active goal and context bundle.
The previous dirty-governance-file blocker is resolved in result.md and execute_review.md.
No src/, tests/, docs/, or benchmarks diff was introduced by Phase 0 execution.
LongMemEval and LoCoMo case-level failures remain separated.
source_hit is not treated as pure evidence localization.
The v3 kernel remains opt-in and default reports have no kernel trace events.
